series.curator_notes: Giraffenaffen is a musical children's series featuring story-songs. Each numbered album contains original songs with sing-along versions. Giraffenaffen 9 'Weltreise' features a proper Hörspiel-style story with 11 chapters. Many albums on this Spotify artist profile are miscategorized compilations from other artists (DIKKA, various artists collections) and should be ignored. 'Nö mit Ö' (2016) is a separate spin-off project with its own narrative. Albums 3-5 and 8 have high track counts due to including both regular and 'Sing mit' versions of each song.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
